testcase.name: afterMethod

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1579, 42). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [c0f49bce6851064e99af57ea87436ee5, clickElement {id=f.1409924CF14C2471A8F4A371FEDF1974.d.1C7DF957E41966D9BF7B563B82424E14.e.147}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.217, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\INNOVA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65481}, goog:processID: 15420, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65481/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.217, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (c0f49bce6851064e99af57ea87436ee5)] -> xpath: //img[@class='profile-img']] Session ID: c0f49bce6851064e99af57ea87436ee5

testcase.name: doctorAddingSlot
